CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Continued To Apr-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. BRIAN LEACH, ESQ. of Leach & McGreevy, Tel No. 415-775-4455 appearing for Defendants Topa Insurance Co. and Anchor Claims Services, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS TOPA INSURANCE CO. AND ANCHOR CLAIMS SERVICES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT to both causes of action is sustained without leave to amend. Both claims allege that requiring plaintiff to pay more if she chose not to use a particular shop is unlawful. Yet the Maystruck and Ortega cases hold to the contrary and the 2010 amendment to Insurance Code 758.5 has not diminished the binding nature or application of those decisions. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. BRIAN LEACH, ESQ. of Leach & McGreevy, Tel No. 415-775-4455 appearing for Defendants Topa Insurance Co. and Anchor Claims Services, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS TOPA INSURANCE CO. AND ANCHOR CLAIMS SERVICES, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is off calendar in light of the ruling on defendants' demurrer. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Continued To Feb-23-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANTS TOPA INSURANCE CO. AND ANCHOR CLAIMS SERVICES, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to February 23, 2016, to give all parties an opportunity to comply with SF Local Rule 2.7B. All parties shall provide courtesy copies of their filings with department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
